description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The sofa consists of three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The right side of the sofa extends into a chaise lounge, providing additional seating or lounging space. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The base of the sofa is supported by short, block-style legs with a metallic or dark finish, and the back and sides display subtle geometric paneling for added visual interest. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with a chaise lounge, straight padded armrests, and geometric paneling on the sides and back.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, three seat and back cushions, chaise lounge on the right, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric paneling on the armrest and back, as well as the sofa's block-style legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the geometric paneling across the back of the sofa.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the chaise lounge extension, with clear visibility of the sofa's leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, with a chaise lounge extension; all cushions are rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a flat profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, with a dark or metallic finish; legs are slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle geometric paneling on the sides and back; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
